landing.title: HEY — A delightfully fresh take on email + calendar, from 37signals
landing.text:
HEY — A delightfully fresh take on email + calendar, from 37signals
Features
Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs
Sign in
Try HEY free
Menu
Features
Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs
Sign in
Try HEY free
Finally a privacy-respecting inbox
Email has been re-invented
I’m loving the HEY Calendar app
We finally fixed your
email
+
calendar!
Gmail, Outlook, and Apple got complacent and took their eye off the ball. Then along came HEY.
Try HEY free for 30-days
No obligation, no CC required.
See how HEY works
People
*really*
like HEY
Tens of thousands
of people have already made the switch from Gmail, Yahoo Mail, Outlook, and other email
+
calendar services.
Just got a demo of HEY with
@jasonfried
. ❤️
The level of product thinking
that’s gone into rebuilding email from scratch.
Ryan Hoover
In positive news, HEY seems to have finally solved email (!!!). Been using it several weeks and
no longer dealing with spam, long lists of “unread” messages, or sorting out annoying but important docs.
The relief is so real. 🙌
Darya Rose
HEY is the most exciting app I’ve used in years.
A complete rethinking of email, full of bold, brilliant ideas. Highly recommended. Not only for the product itself, but because its boldness will inspire you to question your assumptions and think differently.
Adrian Holovaty
Gmail and virtually all of its competitors assume anyone should be able to email you and then you should store and sort and search and categorize those messages.
HEY assumes that only the people you want email from should be able to email you.
Ezra Klein
If you designed email from scratch such that it vigorously protected your privacy and your time, this is what it would look like.
I think you’re going to love it. 🏆
Mike Davidson
HEY is a game changer for email and owning your time.
A big part of my work is diving into new teams and email gets flooded quickly.
@jasonfried
,
@dhh
and their team are changing the foundation for my work and it’s amazing.
Chantal Ireland
I just got an early demo of HEY from
@jasonfried
. I can confirm this will be my new default email over Gmail…
it’s a beautiful rethinking of everything wrong with email.
I can’t wait for you all to play with it soon.
Kevin Rose
Let me tell ya’ll something:
HEY is going to change the way we use email.
Bye-bye Gmail. Helllooooo HEY.
Kris Smith
Happy to say that HEY is every bit as clever as I expected,
a radical rethinking of email and dramatically better in a dozen ways.
(And because it’s by the
@basecamp
team, I know it won’t get swallowed up by BigTechCo a month after launch.)
Andy Baio
There’s plenty more where those came from
— keep reading the
nice things people are saying
about HEY.
Screen emails like you screen your calls
The first time someone emails you they land in
The Screener
. You decide if you want to hear from them or not.
Yes
and they’re in,
No
and you’ll never hear from them again. You’re in control.
The Imbox is for your important email
When you say “Yes”, their email lands in the
Imbox
by default. It’s the place for emails you actually want to read, from
im
portant people and services you absolutely want to hear from.
A Paper Trail for receipts and transactions
Keep transactional email clutter in one place, out of your face. When you need to refer to a receipt, order confirmation, service notification, etc. just head over to the
Paper Trail
.
The Feed is for your casual, whenever reads
The Feed
turns newsletters and long-reads into a browsable, casual newsfeed. Just scroll, everything’s open already. See something you like? Click it and read the whole thing right in place.
Calendaring sucked for years, we fixed it
Digital calendars have barely evolved for decades. Our all-new
Calendar
is a modern, breath-of-fresh-air take on calendaring.
And there’s so much more
When you put it all together — power over who gets through to you, purpose-built boxes for the different flavors of emails, dedicated workflows, strong privacy protections, and an innovative, integrated calendar —
it’s like magic
.
Hey everyone—
I’m Jason, CEO here at 37signals.
Email gets a bad rap, but it shouldn’t. Email’s a treasure.
It feels great to get an email from someone you care about. Or a newsletter you enjoy. Or an update from a service you like. That’s how email used to feel all the time.
But things changed.
You started getting stuff you didn’t want from people you didn’t know. You lost control over who could reach you. An avalanche of automated emails cluttered everything up.
And Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, and Apple just let it happen.
Now email feels like a chore, rather than a joy. Something you fall behind on. Something you clear out, not cherish. Rather than delight in it, you deal with it.
And yet, email remains a wonder. Thanks to email, people across cultures, continents, countries, cities, and communities communicate every day. It’s reliable. It’s simple. It makes it easy for two humans to share their love, and for millions of people to earn a living.
So good news, the magic’s still there. It’s just obscured — buried under a mess of bad habits and neglect. Some from people, some from machines, a lot from email software.
Email deserves a dust off. A renovation. Modernized for the way we email today.
With HEY, we’ve done just that. It’s a redo, a rethink, a simplified, potent reintroduction of email. A fresh start, the way it should be.
HEY is our love letter to email and calendars, and we’re sending it to you on the Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android.
Jason Fried
Co-founder & CEO
Close
HEY has a calendar now!
Calendaring sucked for years. We fixed it.
We transformed email, and now we’re bringing the same magic to calendaring.
Take a closer look
Try HEY free
Have
a great
day!
Join more than 150,000 people who get our email newsletter.
We’ll share product updates, thoughts, new releases, and other tidbits we think you’ll find interesting.
Subscribe
Thanks! You’re in.
Look out for our latest newsletter in the next few weeks.

pricing.title: HEY — Two flavors, two prices
pricing.text:
HEY — Two flavors, two prices
Features
Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs
Sign in

Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs

two prices

We simply sell an
excellent
email
+

HEY for You
The personal email
+
calendar service with a highly
desirable
@hey.com email address
$99
per year
Try HEY free for 30-days
HEY for You includes:
A @HEY.com address
Every account includes a @hey.com address of your choosing
The HEY Calendar
Our all-new
incredible calendar
is included in your account.
Built-in workflows
The core
email-redefining features
in HEY are yours to use

Use HEY on the
Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android
Spy pixel blocking
HEY
stops people from snooping
on your activity
100GB storage space
Plenty of room for all your emails and attachments
A HEY World personal blog
Email the web with
HEY World
Privacy, guaranteed
We won’t use personal data to sell ads or any other purpose
HEY for Domains
Email for companies or individuals who
want to use their own
custom domain name
$12
per user,
per month
Get started with HEY for Domains
HEY for Domains includes:
The best of HEY, and then some
Each user gets
everything included in the HEY for You plan
,
except
for a @hey.com email address and a personal blog
$2/month first-user discount
The first user — you — is only $10/month, the rest are $12/month
Custom domain
Send and receive emails using your own domain name
Multi-user
Centralized billing and account management for your team
Thread sharing
Add people to threads
instead of cc’ing and forwarding
Private team comments
Private thread comments keep the entire story in one place
Email aliases
Set up aliases like support@ that go to multiple people
New!
Invite the whole family
Introducing HEY for Families — add up to 4 additional people for just $179/year total.
Each person gets their own @hey.com email address, calendar, and account.
To get started,
sign up for HEY for You
, then
see how to switch to HEY for Families
.
HEY FAQs
How much are ultra-short email addresses?
Ultra-short 2-character addresses like ab@hey.com are $999/year, and 3-character addresses like abc@hey.com are $349/year. All other @hey.com email addresses, 4-characters or more, are just $99/year.
Will I be charged when my 30-day trial is up?
No. We don’t ask for a credit card to try HEY, so we can’t charge you until you decide you want to become a customer. 100% your call, no surprises.
Can I pay monthly? And what payment methods?
We only offer annual billing at this time. We will bill you $99 once-per-year (which breaks down to $8.25/month for 12 months of service). We require a credit or debit card for payment. We can’t accept purchase orders, checks, ACH/wire, PayPal, cryptocurrency, barter, or other forms of payment.
Do you offer family plan pricing?
Yes, we do! HEY for Families is specially priced at $179/year to share with up to four members of your family.
Can I cancel at any time?
Yes.
If you’re still on the trial when you cancel
, you can export your email and contacts so you can take them with you.
If you’re a paying customer at the time of cancellation
, you can export your email, contacts,
and
set up forwarding to another email address so you never lose any email sent to your cancelled @hey.com address.
HEY for Domains FAQs
Can I pay yearly? And what payment methods?
Currently we only offer monthly billing for HEY for Domains. We require a credit card for payment (Visa, Mastercard, and American Express) — no invoices, no checks, no ACH/wire, no PayPal, and no cryptocurrency.
Is there a free trial of HEY for Domains?
We don’t offer a free trial of HEY for Domains, but you can get a free trial of the personal version of HEY. HEY for Domains is the same version, with a bunch of extra great features layered on top. We do, however, give you 30 days to complete the HEY for Domains setup and switchover process, so you’ll have plenty of time to get everyone ready to make the switch.
What happens when I add or remove someone?
When you add a new user or remove an existing user, the new price will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
Can I cancel at any time?
Yes. HEY for Domains is billed monthly, with no long term commitment. Cancel at any time. Export your account data at any time.
General FAQs
Are taxes included in the price?
No. Any taxes we collect are in addition to the stated prices.
Read our taxes policy
to find out if we collect taxes in your jurisdiction.
Do you bill in local currencies?
We only bill in US Dollars. We know that means a high price in certain markets, and we know there’s lots of interest in HEY in those markets. We’ll consider alternate pricing down the road, but for now USD it is.
What if I have more questions?
Send us an email at
support@hey.com
and we’ll help you out.
HEY has a calendar now!
Calendaring sucked for years. We fixed it.
We transformed email, and now we’re bringing the same magic to calendaring.
Take a closer look
Try HEY free
Have
a nice
day!

docs.title: HEY — Frequently asked questions about HEY
docs.text:
HEY — Frequently asked questions about HEY
Features
Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs
Sign in
Try HEY free
Menu
Features
Calendar
For domains
Pricing
FAQs
Sign in
Try HEY free
F-HEY-Qs
Frequently asked questions about HEY.
Can it? Will it? Does it?
Can I use my own custom domain with HEY?
Is there a wait list for specific email addresses?
Can my company host all our email on HEY?
Does HEY have a calendar?
Can I set up multiple @hey.com addresses?
Will HEY work on my Android device?
Privacy & Security
How’s HEY’s security?
Does HEY serve ads or sell my personal data?
Why should I trust you with my email?
Can you read my emails?
What about encryption?
What if I forget my password?
Why does it say my backup email address isn’t verified?
Import & Transition
Do I need Gmail, Outlook, Apple, etc. to use HEY?
Can I import my Gmail, Outlook, Apple email into HEY?
Can I send-as Gmail if I have advanced protection on?
Can I check my HEY email with my existing email app?
Can I use HEY to check my other email accounts?
Can I import my contacts into HEY?
Trial, Cancellation, Export
If I don’t like HEY, can I export my email and contacts?
If I cancel, can I forward my @hey.com address elsewhere?
If I cancel, does someone else get my @hey.com address?
Questions about HEY for Domains?
Read the HEY for Domains FAQs
.
Can it? Will it? Does it?
Can I use my own custom domain with HEY?
Yes, and you have two options; 1. You can sign up for
HEY for Domains
and host your domain with us, or 2. Set up your personal account to
send from an external address using SMTP
.
Is there a wait list for specific email addresses?
There is not a wait list for specific addresses, primarily for privacy reasons. If you want something@hey.com, and it’s taken, you can try again another time. If someone’s on a trial, and they don’t end up paying, that address will be released back into the pool of available addresses approximately 90 days after their trial expires. But if someone is already using that address, and they’ve paid for a full year of HEY, it’s theirs forever and it’ll never be available again.
Can my company host all our email on HEY?
Yes.
HEY for Domains
includes custom domains, centralized user management, and tools that let you collaborate on email together.
Does HEY have a calendar?
Yes, and an incredibly innovative one. It’s all new for 2024.
Check it out
, it’s included for free with your HEY account.
Can I set up multiple @hey.com addresses?
Yes. You can link up multiple HEY accounts, and view them together without having to log in and out. If you want to view one account at a time, you can do that too.
Learn more about linking accounts
.
Will HEY work on my Android device?
HEY requires Android 10 or above. You’ll also need two more things 1) the latest version of Google Play Services and 2) Android System WebView 120+ or Chrome 120+ (depending on your device). Unfortunately, if your device’s manufacturer didn’t include these, you’ll likely run into technical difficulties that we won’t be able to support.
Privacy & Security
How’s HEY’s security?
Strong. Two-factor authentication is required for all paying customers. To enable two-factor, click your initials in the top right corner and select
Login & Security
. We even support hardware security tokens like USB Keys, fingerprint readers, etc. See our
security page
for all the details.
Does HEY serve ads or sell my personal data?
Absolutely not. HEY is, and will always be, 100% ad-free. We never look at your email (unless we have your permission to troubleshoot an issue). We don’t mine your data, we don’t sell your data, we don’t have any interest in your data. Our business model is simple; we make the best email service we can, and we charge our customers to use that service. That’s the only way we make money.
Why should I trust you with my email?
Great question.
We’ve been in business for 24 years
, have a widely-respected reputation for building great products, our
uptime record
is exceptional, we’re completely independent and don’t answer to the whims of investors or corporate overlords, and we’ve been profitable for more than two straight decades. If you have any other questions about us, please
get in touch
.
Can you read my emails?
Technically, yes, but practically, everything is locked down tight. We hold the encryption keys to be able to send and display your email, but we have strong and strict access protocols, policies, and auditing in place to prevent misuse. Every instance of data decryption by our team is logged, and that log is reviewed on a weekly basis by a separate team. Read more about
our security approach
.
What about encryption?
HEY’s database (which holds your email) is encrypted both at rest and at work, which means our technical team can access the database for service, support, tuning, and forensics, without giving them access to people’s actual emails. HEY is not end-to-end encrypted (we still hold the keys), but otherwise it’s as locked down as can be.
What if I forget my password?
Don’t worry, it happens. First, head to the
Forgot your password
screen and enter your @hey.com email address. Next, HEY will send a message to your backup email (you provided a backup email address when you signed-up for HEY—it might be your work email or a Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, or iCloud account). Look there for a message from support@hey.com, “Reset your HEY password”, and hit the link inside. That will take you back to HEY where you can enter a new password and get back in to your account.
Why does it say my backup email address isn’t verified?
If you forget your password, HEY sends reset instructions to the backup email address you provided when you signed-up. But before we can send the reset instructions, you need to verify the backup email address is really yours. To verify, look in your backup email account (it might be your work email or a Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, or iCloud account) for a message from support@hey.com with the subject “Verify your HEY backup email”. Hit the link inside that email to confirm it’s your backup email address. Now you’ll be able to
reset your password
.
Import & Transition
Do I need Gmail, Outlook, Apple, etc. to use HEY?
No. HEY is an email provider, it’s not an app you use to check your existing Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, etc. HEY is a replacement for those services. HEY is all you need to send, receive, and organize email. You can forward your current email to HEY, but when you sign up for HEY you’ll get a brand new @hey.com email address.
Can I import my Gmail, Outlook, Apple email into HEY?
You can forward new email from any service into HEY, but HEY does not import your existing email from Gmail, Outlook, iCloud. HEY is a fresh start moving forward. Your old email will remain wherever it was, so you can go back there when you need to reference something from the past.
Read our complete guide on moving from Gmail to HEY for details
.
Can I send-as Gmail if I have advanced protection on?
Not at this time. Google accounts that are part of the Advanced Protection Program are limited to only use Google apps, Apple Mail, and Thunderbird.
Can I check my HEY email with my existing email app?
In order to use HEY, you’ll need to use one of our custom Web, Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android apps (you can
grab them right here
. HEY treats email in all sorts of special ways, so off-the-shelf 3rd party email apps won’t work with HEY.
Can I use HEY to check my other email accounts?
You can forward email from other accounts to your HEY account, but you can’t log in and check other email accounts from the HEY apps. HEY doesn’t support IMAP or POP.
Can I import my contacts into HEY?
Yes, in vCard format. Once logged in, click the HEY menu at the top of the screen, then select
Contacts
.
Trial, Cancellation, Export
If I don’t like HEY, can I export my email and contacts?
Absolutely. You can export an MBOX file with all your email and attachments any time. You can import that file into Apple Mail, Gmail, Outlook, and other services. You can also export all your contacts into a single vCard.
If I cancel, can I forward my @hey.com address elsewhere?
Yes. As long as you’ve paid for your first year of service, you can forward any email you receive while your account is open, or after it’s closed, to any other email address you’d like. Trial accounts don’t include forever-forwarding either.
If I cancel, does someone else get my @hey.com address?
It depends. As long as you’ve paid for your first year of service, your @hey.com address is yours forever, even if you stop using HEY and don’t pay for HEY in subsequent years. That means no one else will ever be able to claim your email address, or receive password or security resets at your original @hey.com address. If you don’t pay for your first year, or you cancel and request a refund within the first year, or you never go beyond the free trial, your @hey.com email address will be recycled after 90 days and made available to someone else.
HEY has a calendar now!
Calendaring sucked for years. We fixed it.
We transformed email, and now we’re bringing the same magic to calendaring.
Take a closer look
Try HEY free
Have
a delightful
day!
Join more than 150,000 people who get our email newsletter.
We’ll share product updates, thoughts, new releases, and other tidbits we think you’ll find interesting.
Subscribe
Thanks! You’re in.
Look out for our latest newsletter in the next few weeks.

analysis.name: Hey
analysis.tagline: We finally fixed your email + calendar!
analysis.value_proposition: An opinionated, privacy-first email and calendar service that gives users control over who can reach them through a sender-approval model and purpose-built inbox routing.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious individuals and small teams fed up with Gmail/Outlook who want a curated, opinionated inbox that eliminates spam and tracking

features.name: the screener
features.description: First-time senders land in a triage queue; user approves or permanently blocks before any email reaches the inbox
features.evidence_quote: The first time someone emails you they land in The Screener. You decide if you want to hear from them or not.

features.name: imbox
features.description: Priority inbox section exclusively for approved, important senders
features.evidence_quote: When you say 'Yes', their email lands in the Imbox by default. It's the place for emails you actually want to read.

features.name: paper trail
features.description: Dedicated section for receipts, order confirmations, and transactional email, kept out of the main inbox
features.evidence_quote: Keep transactional email clutter in one place, out of your face. When you need to refer to a receipt...

features.name: the feed
features.description: Newsletters and long-reads rendered as a scrollable newsfeed with all messages pre-opened
features.evidence_quote: The Feed turns newsletters and long-reads into a browsable, casual newsfeed. Just scroll, everything's open already.

features.name: integrated calendar
features.description: Built-in calendar redesigned from scratch and included free with every HEY account
features.evidence_quote: The HEY Calendar — Our all-new incredible calendar is included in your account.

features.name: spy pixel blocking
features.description: Automatically strips tracking pixels so senders cannot detect when or whether emails are opened
features.evidence_quote: Spy pixel blocking — HEY stops people from snooping on your activity

features.name: hey world personal blog
features.description: Built-in publishing platform allowing users to email blog posts to the public web
features.evidence_quote: A HEY World personal blog — Email the web with HEY World

features.name: 100gb storage
features.description: 100 GB of storage for emails and attachments per account
features.evidence_quote: 100GB storage space — Plenty of room for all your emails and attachments

features.name: cross-platform apps
features.description: Native apps for Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android
features.evidence_quote: Apps for every platform — Use HEY on the Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android

features.name: hey.com vanity address
features.description: Custom @hey.com email address of the user's choosing included with personal plan
features.evidence_quote: A @HEY.com address — Every account includes a @hey.com address of your choosing

features.name: custom domain email
features.description: Send and receive email using a custom domain name (HEY for Domains plan only)
features.evidence_quote: Custom domain — Send and receive emails using your own domain name

features.name: thread sharing
features.description: Add teammates to email threads instead of CC-ing or forwarding (Domains plan)
features.evidence_quote: Thread sharing — Add people to threads instead of cc'ing and forwarding

features.name: private team comments
features.description: Internal-only comments on email threads visible only to your team, keeping full context in one place
features.evidence_quote: Private thread comments keep the entire story in one place

features.name: email aliases
features.description: Create aliases like support@ that route to multiple team members (Domains plan)
features.evidence_quote: Email aliases — Set up aliases like support@ that go to multiple people

features.name: centralized team billing and user management
features.description: Admin controls for adding/removing users and managing billing across the whole team
features.evidence_quote: Multi-user — Centralized billing and account management for your team

features.name: multiple account linking
features.description: Link and switch between multiple HEY accounts without logging in and out
features.evidence_quote: You can link up multiple HEY accounts, and view them together without having to log in and out.

features.name: two-factor authentication
features.description: Mandatory 2FA for all paying customers via app or hardware security token
features.evidence_quote: Two-factor authentication is required for all paying customers.

features.name: hardware security key support
features.description: Supports physical 2FA tokens including USB keys and fingerprint readers
features.evidence_quote: We even support hardware security tokens like USB Keys, fingerprint readers, etc.

features.name: no ads and no data selling
features.description: 100% ad-free service; no data mining, profiling, or selling of user data
features.evidence_quote: HEY is, and will always be, 100% ad-free. We don't mine your data, we don't sell your data.

features.name: database encryption at rest
features.description: Email database encrypted at rest and in transit; not end-to-end encrypted (37signals holds keys)
features.evidence_quote: HEY's database is encrypted both at rest and at work...HEY is not end-to-end encrypted (we still hold the keys)

features.name: email import
features.description: Import existing email from Gmail, Outlook, or Apple Mail when migrating to HEY
features.evidence_quote: Can I import my Gmail, Outlook, Apple email into HEY?

features.name: contact import
features.description: Import contacts from existing email providers into HEY
features.evidence_quote: Can I import my contacts into HEY?

features.name: smtp send-as external address
features.description: Configure personal HEY account to send from an external email address via SMTP
features.evidence_quote: Set up your personal account to send from an external address using SMTP

features.name: email and contact export
features.description: Full export of all email and contacts at any point, including on cancellation
features.evidence_quote: you can export your email and contacts so you can take them with you.

features.name: forwarding after cancellation
features.description: Cancelled @hey.com address can forward incoming email to another provider so no mail is lost
features.evidence_quote: set up forwarding to another email address so you never lose any email sent to your cancelled @hey.com address

features.name: 30-day free trial no credit card
features.description: 30-day trial with no credit card required and no obligation to convert
features.evidence_quote: Try HEY free for 30-days. No obligation, no CC required.

features.name: family plan
features.description: Flat-rate annual plan covering up to 5 total family members, each with a full HEY account and @hey.com address
features.evidence_quote: HEY for Families — add up to 4 additional people for just $179/year total.

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Full keyboard shortcut support for navigating and processing email
features.evidence_quote: Keyboard shortcuts

features.name: decryption audit logging
features.description: Every instance of team data decryption is logged and reviewed weekly by a separate internal team
features.evidence_quote: Every instance of data decryption by our team is logged, and that log is reviewed on a weekly basis by a separate team.

differentiators: Sender approval model (The Screener) — only people you allow can email you
Spy pixel blocking prevents open tracking by senders
No ads, no data selling — pure subscription business model
Opinionated inbox routing: Imbox / Paper Trail / The Feed built in
HEY World: built-in personal blog/newsletter publishing platform
30-day trial with zero credit card required
Independent, profitable company (37signals, 24 years); no investors or acquisition risk
Private team thread comments visible only to team (Domains plan)
Thread sharing replaces CC and forwarding (Domains plan)
Address is yours forever once paid — never recycled to another user

recent_ships.what: HEY Calendar — all-new integrated calendar built from scratch
recent_ships.source: Does HEY have a calendar? Yes, and an incredibly innovative one. It's all new for 2024.

recent_ships.what: HEY for Families — shared family plan for up to 5 total members at $179/year flat
recent_ships.source: New! Invite the whole family — Introducing HEY for Families — add up to 4 additional people for just $179/year total.

praised: "The level of product thinking that's gone into rebuilding email from scratch." — Ryan Hoover
"no longer dealing with spam, long lists of 'unread' messages, or sorting out annoying but important docs. The relief is so real." — Darya Rose
"HEY is the most exciting app I've used in years. A complete rethinking of email, full of bold, brilliant ideas." — Adrian Holovaty
"If you designed email from scratch such that it vigorously protected your privacy and your time, this is what it would look like." — Mike Davidson
"a radical rethinking of email and dramatically better in a dozen ways" — Andy Baio
"HEY is a game changer for email and owning your time." — Chantal Ireland
"HEY assumes that only the people you want email from should be able to email you." — Ezra Klein

tiers.name: HEY for You
tiers.headline_inclusions: @hey.com address, calendar, all inbox workflows, spy pixel blocking, HEY World blog, 100GB storage, all platform apps

tiers.name: HEY for Families
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 5 family members total, each with full HEY account and @hey.com address; $179/year billed annually

tiers.name: HEY for Domains
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom domain, multi-user, thread sharing, private team comments, email aliases, centralized billing; first seat $10/mo

pricing.notes: HEY for You billed annually only at $99/yr ($8.25/mo equivalent); no monthly option. HEY for Domains billed monthly only at $12/user/mo with a first-user discount to $10/mo; no annual option. Ultra-short addresses premium-priced: 2-char $999/yr, 3-char $349/yr; standard 4-char+ addresses included in base $99/yr. HEY for Families is a separate $179/yr flat add-on for up to 4 additional members (5 total). No credit card required for 30-day personal trial; no trial offered for Domains plan. USD only, no local currency billing.
